ddls:
CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "app_name" TEXT /* Name of the application */,
  "organization_id" TEXT /* ID of the organization the application belongs to */,
  "space_id" TEXT /* ID of the space the application is deployed in */,
  "app_version" TEXT /* Version of the application */,
  "app_uris" TEXT /* Array of URIs for the application */,
  "app_type" TEXT /* Type of the application (e.g., java, python, nodejs) */,
  "buildpacks" TEXT /* Array of buildpacks used for the application */,
  "log_rate_limit" TEXT /* Log rate limit for the application */,
  "manifest_env_vars" TEXT /* Environment variables defined in the manifest file */,
  "routes" TEXT /* Routing information for the application */,
  "last_deployed" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last deployment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the application was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the application was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("app_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_space_id FOREIGN KEY ("space_id") REFERENCES spaces ("space_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_organization_id FOREIGN KEY ("organization_id") REFERENCES organizations ("organization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organizations" (
  "organization_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each organization */,
  "organization_name" TEXT /* Name of the organization */,
  "organization_description" TEXT /* Description of the organization */,
  "organization_created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the organization was created */,
  "organization_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the organization was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spaces" (
  "space_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each space */,
  "organization_id" TEXT /* ID of the organization the space belongs to */,
  "space_name" TEXT /* Name of the space */,
  "space_description" TEXT /* Description of the space */,
  "space_created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the space was created */,
  "space_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the space was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("space_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deployments" (
  "deployment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deployment event */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application being deployed */,
  "scan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the scan associated with the deployment */,
  "deploy_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the deployment */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file being deployed */,
  "dependencies" TEXT /* Array of dependencies for the application */,
  "user_defined_env_vars" TEXT /* User-defined environment variables */,
  "system_env_vars" TEXT /* System (VCAP) environment variables */,
  "memory" TEXT /* Memory allocated to the application */,
  "instances" INTEGER /* Number of instances */,
  "disk_quota" TEXT /* Disk quota for the application */,
  "deploy_status" TEXT /* Status of the deployment (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the deployment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the deployment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deployment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deployments_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deployments_scan_id FOREIGN KEY ("scan_id") REFERENCES scans ("scan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scans" (
  "scan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scan event */,
  "scan_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the scan */,
  "scan_type" TEXT /* Type of the scan */,
  "scan_status" TEXT /* Status of the scan (e.g., completed, in progress) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the scan was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the scan was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency */,
  "dependency_name" TEXT /* Name of the dependency */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dependency */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dependency */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dependency was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dependency was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environment_variables" (
  "env_var_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environment variable */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application the variable belongs to */,
  "var_name" TEXT /* Name of the environment variable */,
  "var_value" TEXT /* Value of the environment variable */,
  "var_type" TEXT /* Type of the environment variable (e.g., user-defined, system) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the environment variable was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the environment variable was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("env_var_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environment_variables_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, admin, operator) */,
  "organization_id" TEXT /* ID of the organization the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_organization_id FOREIGN KEY ("organization_id") REFERENCES organizations ("organization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the application */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the application was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, deploy, modify) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access event was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access event was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "buildpacks" (
  "buildpack_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each buildpack */,
  "buildpack_url" TEXT /* URL of the buildpack repository */,
  "buildpack_name" TEXT /* Name of the buildpack */,
  "buildpack_version" TEXT /* Version of the buildpack */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the buildpack was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the buildpack was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("buildpack_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application the route belongs to */,
  "route_url" TEXT /* URL of the route */,
  "protocol" TEXT /* Protocol used for the route (e.g., http, https, http2) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the route was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the route was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_routes_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_dependencies" (
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application */,
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dependency */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dependency was added to the application */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dependency was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("app_id", "dependency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_routes" (
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the route was added to the application */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the route was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("app_id", "route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_buildpacks" (
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application */,
  "buildpack_id" INTEGER /* ID of the buildpack */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the buildpack was added to the application */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the buildpack was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("app_id", "buildpack_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id")
)
